cards.name: Charles E Poch
cards.notes: WØENO Amateur Radio Club (Longmont, Colorado) and Colorado ARES Emergency Services affiliated. Grid DN70md, Weld County. Moose image on front card.

cards.name: Kevin Fortner

cards.name: Wendell E Reeve
cards.notes: Base station. Operator Wendell Reeve. Parks on the Air (POTA) activation at Your Park US-3322. Apologetic note about delay in printing first QSL cards.

cards.name: Jeremy H Penner
cards.notes: Contact confirmed with Jeremy Penner, portable (/P) operation. Frequency 28.075 MHz. Grid square EL29gr noted on QSL.

cards.name: Dr. Rick Dorsch (op-NE8Z)

cards.name: Jason W Bryant
cards.notes: RST 59. Radio: G90. Operator Jason Bryant, Grand Junction, MI.

cards.name: Deborah V Libertore
cards.notes: POTA K-3322, THX QSL type

cards.name: James C Clark
cards.notes: Operator: James "Jim" Clark. TS-950 transceiver, 100 watts, 130' EFHW antenna. Sussex County, Delaware.

cards.notes: 1895-M-1 12" Coastal defense gun at Ft. Miles, Cape Henlopen State Park, Lewes, DE. FM28gv

cards.name: Christopher P Noyes
cards.notes: Operator: Christopher Noyes. Confirming QSO with K8JKU.

cards.name: RYAN M SMITH
cards.notes: Operator: Ryan Smith. RST 59. YAESU FT-891/450D transceiver.

cards.name: 13 colonies special event delaware Special Event Station
cards.notes: 13 Original Colonies Special Event - Caesar Rodney (1728-1784) commemorative operation. Contact was via K2E station operating as K2E for the special event.

cards.name: Scott A Phillips
cards.notes: TT4 Antennas for RX and TX. TT4 Pota QSO. 73. Operator: Scott Phillips. Snohomish County Grid: CN87vw

cards.name: CARLOS ROMERO ROCHA
cards.notes: Hunter and Activator. POTA (Parks on the Air) member indicated by logo.

cards.name: Scott M Slater
cards.notes: Operator Scott Slater. Thanks for the Salmon Run Contact! 73!

cards.name: CAROL J RYAN
cards.notes: Montana location. Contact made via S Nine W Five (signal report 5x9). Card shows topographic map of Montana/Idaho region with Bitterroot Range and Salmon River visible.

cards.name: Jessy W Johnston
cards.notes: Outhouse ham shack called 'The Crap Shack'. Operator: Jessy Johnston. QRZ.com page available for more information. CQ Zone 3, Grid CN86, ITU Zone 6.

cards.name: Jack Flemmings
cards.notes: Riverside County, California. Operator: Jack Flemmings. Straight Key Century Club member #12847. RST: 4/4. Frequency: 14.397 MHz.

cards.name: RICHARD D VERNOT
cards.notes: PDTA US-3313. Transceiver: IC-7300, Antenna: 20M EENW VPZ3. Also logged QSO with KD6GLN on 2024-06-22 at 00:29 UTC on 14.343 MHz in SSB mode using KT891 transceiver with 100W and 17 Whip antenna, from US-4454 about 3000 ft elevation.

cards.name: BROOKS G DORROH
cards.notes: Operator: Brooks G. Dorroh. Message written on card: 'James, TNX for activation! Nice QSL card. I know Clarkston as I grew up in Vassar, MI. Back in 50s-60s POTA on.' (text appears incomplete)

cards.name: Elizabeth A Morris-Mowrey
cards.notes: POTA reference K-1198 (Muir Woods National Monument). Contact made at 22:39 UTC on 20m SSB at 14.220 MHz. Thank you message for contact and QSL card. Antenna: ATAS 25 radio

cards.name: Neil R Smith
cards.notes: Licensed 2005. RST 5/1/7. Confirming QSO with IZ8SIL/U.

cards.name: David B Sanders
cards.notes: David Sanders, County of Sacramento ITU 6 Zone 3 CM98kp. Contact made at Folsom Prison water tower landmark. Thank you message handwritten on card. NCCC, LoTW, QRZ, eQSL clublog affiliations noted.

cards.name: PATRICK J GILBERT
cards.notes: Los Angeles County Grid: DM04k TNX QSL checked

cards.name: Gary L Schaffer

cards.name: DANIEL J DOMONDON
cards.notes: Los Angeles County, DM03wv. Operator: Daniel J. Domondon. Card also references K8JKU contact on 2023-12-26 at 2.9 MHz, 55 RST, SSB mode.

cards.name: DANIEL J DOMONDON
cards.notes: Los Angeles County. QTH Pota K33/3. Contact also confirmed with K8JKU on 2023-12-26 at 2329 UTC on 2m SSB with RST 55.

cards.name: Daniel M Loeb
cards.notes: Kern River Oil Field, Bakersfield, California

cards.name: TODD M REMINGTON
cards.notes: Operator: Todd Remington. Plumas County, California. SOTA reference and NCCC club affiliation noted on card. Also sent a follow-up postcard: Thanks for the POTA activation, look for you on the next one! 72/73, Todd

cards.notes: White-Breasted Nuthatch - bird illustration on QSL card

cards.notes: Grid Square FM09, Garrett County. End-fed half-wave antenna. 73, RIC

cards.notes: Grid Square FM09, Garrett County. End-fed HMF wire antenna. Thanks for contact at ARRL SOTA activation of 3313. Thanks for RIC.

cards.name: HAYDEN L FOY, III

cards.notes: Prince George's County, Maryland. Grid FM18ow. ARRL member.

cards.name: Edgar D Hopson

cards.notes: Located in Calvert County, Maryland. Grid Square FM18qr. ITU Zone 8, CQ Zone 5. Operator: Dale L Sollars. Contact confirmed with K8JKU.

cards.notes: Lyon County, Grid EN24ck. 100 watts output, MP-1 antenna, ground mounted. POTA on 1 (Park on the Air). RST 59.

cards.notes: Operator: Doug Riddell-Dudra. Power: 100W. Antenna: Dipole. QSL via KBSIFH. Beautiful scenic postcard showing canoes on a Minnesota lake with forest shoreline.

cards.name: ARTHUR F WOODS
cards.notes: Anoka County, Minnesota. Grid EN35hh. 10-X International Net, Inc. operator Art F. Woods

cards.notes: Joe Hibberd, 781 Eagle Ridge Trail, Washington County, Grid EN35nb, YAESU FT-857D transceiver

cards.name: John D Elston
cards.notes: SOTA participant. Thanks for the QSO and Jim Park. Operating from K-1503 MI location.

cards.name: GEORGE R BABCOCK
cards.notes: Arenac County. Grid: EN74x. Operator: George R. Babcock. Contact confirmed with K8JKU.

cards.notes: Grid EM16qe, Creek County, Oklahoma

cards.notes: Thanks for activating US-3323. Located in Garfield County, Oklahoma. Park reference: EM16bl. Contact via K8JKU with UTC 23:28 on 14.339 MHz in 2-way mode.

cards.notes: TNX FER CARD, 73. Operator: Richard "Rich" Rodgers. 80m Full Wave Loop antenna. 500 watts output.

cards.notes: Contact with K8JKU on 20m. Broken Bow Lake near Valliant, OK. Grid: EM24ja. Choctaw County.

cards.notes: Michael VanHuysse, South Lyon Area ARC, grid EN82co. 19:39 UTC, RST 59. Remarks: EDH RULZ! Happy Holidays! 73

cards.name: Darwin L Willhite
cards.notes: Darwin L. Willhite, also holds KC0QNA. 00:36 UTC, RST 59. Yaesu FT-710, quarter-wave 17 ft Chameleon vertical, portable. 73, Darwin

cards.name: William J Gabel
cards.notes: Willie Gabel. Vintage Chesapeake Bay map card.

cards.name: MARK E MAYER
cards.notes: Mark Mayer. 23:41 UTC, RST 59, USB. Idaho map card with Bigfoot statue and portable station photos. Glad to exchange cards, 73. (Original scan was upside down.)

cards.notes: Orange County, California. Operator: Dave Wallick
